ddls:
CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather observation */,
  "observation_time" TEXT /* Local time of the observation */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature recorded at the time of observation */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure at the time of observation */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage at the time of observation */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the time of observation */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of wind at the time of observation */,
  "cloud_cover" TEXT /* Description of cloud cover */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation recorded */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the observation was made */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station where the observation was made */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station where the observation was made */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station above sea level */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Method or device used to collect the data */,
  "data_collection_interval" TEXT /* Frequency at which data is collected (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "cloud_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of cloud cover */,
  "precipitation_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of precipitation */,
  "wind_direction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wind direction */,
  "quality_check_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_wind_direction_id FOREIGN KEY ("wind_direction_id") REFERENCES wind_directions ("wind_direction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_cloud_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cloud_type_id") REFERENCES cloud_types ("cloud_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_quality_check_id FOREIGN KEY ("quality_check_id") REFERENCES data_quality_checks ("quality_check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_precipitation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("precipitation_type_id") REFERENCES precipitation_types ("precipitation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station above sea level */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was established */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which data is collected (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Method or device used to collect the data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather parameter (e.g., Temperature, Humidity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter (e.g., Celsius, hPa) */,
  "range_min" REAL /* Minimum value typically observed */,
  "range_max" REAL /* Maximum value typically observed */,
  "thresholds" TEXT /* Critical thresholds for the parameter (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cloud_types" (
  "cloud_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cloud type */,
  "cloud_description" TEXT /* Description of the cloud type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cloud_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precipitation_types" (
  "precipitation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precipitation type */,
  "precipitation_description" TEXT /* Description of the precipitation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precipitation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_directions" (
  "wind_direction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind direction */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Description of the wind direction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_direction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "quality_check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation being checked */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicator if the observation is valid */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for invalidation if not valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the weather conditions */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station generating the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "coverage_area" TEXT /* Geographic area covered by the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Detailed summary of the weather conditions */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the report */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who approved the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_reports_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_reports_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., Storm, Flood) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was issued */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "affected_areas" TEXT /* Geographic areas affected by the alert */,
  "actions_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken in response to the alert */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id")
)
